text:
Version 3.1.12 is out:

http://www.otrs.com/en/open-source/community-news/releases-notes/release-notes-otrs-help-desk-3112/

Since nothing is heard of "skv" and Frank offered to take over 
maintainership, is there any way to set him as maintainer without the 
current maintainers agreement?

Christian Marg
